channel.title: Server on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Server on Arrans github.io

item.title: stalwartlabs/stalwart
item.description: All-in-one Mail & Collaboration server. Secure, scalable and fluent in every protocol (IMAP, JMAP, SMTP, CalDAV, CardDAV, WebDAV).

item.title: gin-gonic/gin
item.description: Gin is a high-performance HTTP web framework written in Go. It provides a Martini-like API but with significantly better performance—up to 40 times faster—thanks to httprouter. Gin is designed for building REST APIs, web applications, and microservices.

item.title: ancsemi/Haven
item.description: Self-hosted private chat — No cloud, no telemetry, no Big Tech. Discord alternative that runs on your own machine.

item.title: processone/ejabberd
item.description: Robust, Ubiquitous and Massively Scalable Messaging Platform (XMPP, MQTT, SIP Server)

item.title: coollabsio/coolify
item.description: An open-source, self-hostable PaaS alternative to Vercel, Heroku & Netlify that lets you easily deploy static sites, databases, full-stack applications and 280+ one-click services on your own servers.

item.title: Sync-in/server
item.description: Sync-in server · Secure, open-source platform for file storage, sharing, collaboration, and syncing.

item.title: ngircd/ngircd
item.description: Free, portable and lightweight Internet Relay Chat server

item.title: emersion/go-imap
item.description: 📥 An IMAP library for Go clients and servers

item.title: emersion/go-smtp
item.description: 📤 An SMTP library for Go clients and servers

item.title: SoWeBegin/ToyBattlesHQ
item.description: ToyBattlesHQ serves as the central public repository for the server used by ToyBattles - the first (ever!) open-source server emulator for MicroVolts.

item.title: pseidemann/finish
item.description: A non-intrusive, zero dependency library adding a graceful shutdown to Go HTTP servers.

item.title: arran4/goa4web
item.description: My everything website (server) from 2005 ported from C to GO. Ready for news, forums, link sharing, image sharing and more
